steps.title: Identify the reinforcement signal
steps.content: The first sentence claims that using “philo-Publius” accomplished far more than simply concealing his authorship. The blank must transition to a sentence that explains what that “far more” actually was.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”Indeed” introduces a reinforcing elaboration—the second sentence confirms the first's claim by specifying that the pseudonym was a deliberate rhetorical strategy.

The other three either introduce contrast where none exists or suggest an unrelated new point.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
